infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to camera to take photos of plants for disease diagnosis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to photo gallery to select plant images for diagnosis.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your photos to upload plant images for disease diagnosis.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to take photos of plants for disease diagnosis.
